overview: A comprehensive bilingual Patient Management and Doctor Portal for clinics and hospitals, with 8 domain-focused backend canisters for patient data, clinical records, admissions, appointments, queue, alerts, auth, and sync.
features: Multi-canister backend with patient, clinical, admission, appointment, queue, alert, auth, and sync domains
Role-based access control with 13 staff roles
Ward round SOAP notes with Intern-MO-Consultant workflow
Bed management with ICU/HDU/General type flags
Clinical alerts for Sepsis, AKI, and NEWS2
Bilingual English/Bangla public landing page with admin-editable content
Real-time sync across all devices with build-time canister ID embedding
